prompt: An anime-style illustration of a young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="short black hair with bangs"} and purple eyes, leaning casually against a {argument name="machine color" default="vibrant pink"} vending machine on a cobblestone city street. She is wearing an oversized {argument name="hoodie color" default="light purple"} hoodie, frayed denim shorts, black high-top sneakers, and a black backpack. Her arms are crossed, and her legs are crossed at the ankles as she looks calmly to the side. The side of the vending machine features a large, striking advertisement for an energy drink: a black can with a pink graffiti-style smiley face with X eyes and a sticking-out tongue, accompanied by the large text "{argument name="can text" default="NOPE"}". The front of the machine displays rows of various bottled drinks, with a second identical black and pink can graphic visible on the lower panel. The scene is brightly lit with detailed shading and vibrant colors.
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫风格的插画，描绘了一位留着 {argument name="hair style" default="带刘海的黑色短发"}、有着紫色双眼的年轻女性，正悠闲地靠在鹅卵石铺就的城市街道旁的一台 {argument name="machine color" default="亮粉色"} 自动贩卖机上。她穿着一件超大号的 {argument name="hoodie color" default="浅紫色"} 连帽衫、磨边牛仔短裤、黑色高帮运动鞋，并背着一个黑色双肩包。她双臂交叉，双脚踝交叉站立，神情平静地看向侧方。自动贩卖机的侧面印有一幅醒目的大型能量饮料广告：一个黑色的易拉罐，上面绘有粉色的涂鸦风格笑脸，笑脸的双眼为“X”形并吐着舌头，旁边配有醒目的文字“{argument name="can text" default="NOPE"}”。贩卖机正面陈列着多排各种瓶装饮料，下方的面板上还可以看到第二个相同的黑粉色易拉罐图案。场景光线明亮，阴影细节丰富，色彩鲜艳。

breakdown.creativeCore: 靠在自动贩卖机旁的动漫少女：生成一张动漫风格的插画，描绘了一位穿着休闲的少女靠在色彩鲜艳的城市自动贩卖机旁，贩卖机上带有定制的饮料广告。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 城市美食地图、活动导览、园区地图、旅行视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
